{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201643182B2C0D159D7ABCA9C8FA"}"},"total":70},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7599270721873330969","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大太会玩了！用脱口秀的节奏打开五千年历史，全程高能、句句带梗！书中不仅梳理了清晰的朝代脉络，更把帝王将相的故事讲得如同隔壁八卦——那些传奇人物的跌宕人生，都成了鲜活生动的“历史现场秀”。
语言风趣不轻浮，考据扎实不枯燥，既有宏观历史框架，又有细节人文温度！尤其适合历史小白入门，读着笑着就把中国通史装进脑子！这才是真正的“知识脱口秀”，五星怒赞！","text_exts":[{"e":13,"s":10,"text":"脱口秀","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%84%B1%E5%8F%A3%E7%A7%80&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773996198BCA9C8FA%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227599270721873330969%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227496660121158700094%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%84%B1%E5%8F%A3%E7%A7%80%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":152,"s":148,"text":"中国通史","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E9%80%9A%E5%8F%B2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773996198BCA9C8FA%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227599270721873330969%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227496660121158700094%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E9%80%9A%E5%8F%B2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769344976,"group_id":"7496660121158700094","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"静可执书卷，龙游千年岁月；
动能换星海，鱼跃梦里云渊。
身若微尘，心有恶虎。
朱颜有神韵，堂前即吾乡。
盼与君同爱烤肉飘香。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8Y6auumAL6zZQc4kze3bYNU6/tMgtZmj99LNCrdcPHB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ba101fe9f82947159dc6bbe00e1995cb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529545&x-signature=Drb7FT%2BqqD08QCk2gCpwzd41SVs%3D","user_id":"3435313009787820","user_name":"炯炯有神的若尘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3435313009787820","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7496660121158700094","book_info":{"abstract":"这本魔性历史脱口秀集锦，让你笑着笑着把知识点刻进DNA！
【本书三大魔性卖点】
■ 全明星阵容：从三皇五帝到溥仪退位，300+历史/演义人物组团整活
■ 沉浸式吃瓜：用热搜体/弹幕体/朋友圈体打开历史名场面
■ 暴走式吐槽：给秦皇汉武的绩效打分，替诸葛亮优化《出师表》PPT
【适合人群】
✓ 背历史比啃砖头还痛苦的学生党
✓ 想在酒局吹牛时甩段子的社畜
✓ 坚信自己前世是西施的戏精本精
✓ 任何想在厕所笑出鹅叫的人类
PS：本书部分野史效果经过3倍夸张处理，阅读时请勿喝水，如笑到邻居报警，作者概不保释。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o338f5d2d092d898c1fb18e370d52ee1e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"怪谈档案馆","author_id":"","book_id":"7496660121158700094","book_name":"历史脱口秀：从三皇五帝到溥仪","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#689078","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":73,"name":"大唐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=73&name=大唐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":497,"name":"武将","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=497&name=武将&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":502,"name":"宫廷侯爵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=502&name=宫廷侯爵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7496695048411546174","read_count":"438","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1357507"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"406","tags":"历史脑洞,武将,历史,宫廷侯爵,大唐","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o338f5d2d092d898c1fb18e370d52ee1e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180198&x-signature=QXDzlX%2BTP01PuPDa3uJt4qTJvpc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111120126684","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"740"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201643182B2C0D159D7ABCA9C8FA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读115小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":232851,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":414323,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":46},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1769391270,"author_reply_time":1769391274,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7587715817304458009","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一部创意满分、让人捧腹的惊艳之作！
作者“怪谈档案馆”巧妙地将浩瀚历史化为一场精彩的脱口秀，让三皇五帝、文人将相们纷纷化身“梗王”，在幽默的台词和巧妙的现代梗中鲜活起来。
作品既有扎实的历史底蕴为骨，又有天马行空的脑洞为翼，阅读时仿佛在听一场跨越五千年的单口喜剧，轻松爆笑之余，又自然收获了知识。
这种让历史“活”起来的讲述方式，真正打破了枯燥的刻板印象，堪称历史脑洞文中的清流，非常适合想轻松读史的朋友。五星力荐！","text_exts":[{"e":47,"s":44,"text":"脱口秀","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%84%B1%E5%8F%A3%E7%A7%80&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773996198BCA9C8FA%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227587715817304458009%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227496660121158700094%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%84%B1%E5%8F%A3%E7%A7%80%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766656371,"group_id":"7496660121158700094","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱吃烤肉，恶虎堂笔耕，以字入味，邀你共赏文学盛宴。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwJ9vUac5M3enPt70jP2v8bbwPvn2O2Qy4RsoFYcMeBf","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9e6006de0348465da65870908bcfc91c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529112&x-signature=nTX9ZgcCPxdF9R4i4jge%2FXwTNSM%3D","user_id":"3452117440009735","user_name":"爱吃烤肉的恶虎堂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3452117440009735","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1772471844,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"
